variants: Zeliha Aksoy, who works at Juniper Cloud Realty, is an influential voice in the real estate sector. Having been born in Frostvine Bluff, she has built a successful career that has led her to her current residence in Lilypad Shoals. In addition to her professional achievements, Zeliha authored the notable work, Balefire Mirror Study, which has contributed valuable insights to the field. For her dedication and innovative practices, she was honored with the prestigious Dragonwood Torch Award, recognizing her impact on the industry.
